Bazaarvoice is a shopper-engagement platform based in Austin, Texas, founded in 2005. The company connects brands and retailers to authentic customer voices through user-generated content (UGC) such as ratings, reviews, and Q&As. With a mission to enhance shopper experiences, Bazaarvoice serves over 12,000 brand and retail websites, reaching more than a billion monthly shoppers globally.

The platform offers a range of tools focused on UGC and shopper engagement, including Ratings & Reviews, Ask & Answer (Q&A), and SyndicateVoice for content distribution. These features help retailers integrate customer feedback and visual content into their sites, driving business growth. Bazaarvoice supports a diverse clientele, including over 20% of the Fortune 500, and emphasizes a people-first culture, earning recognition as a Great Place to Work in multiple countries.

Short Description:
21 Buttons is a social commerce platform based in Barcelona that merges fashion inspiration with shopping capabilities. Founded in 2015 by Marc Soler and Jaime Farrés, the platform allows users to discover, share, and purchase clothing while earning commissions as influencers. With around two million monthly active users, 21 Buttons has successfully raised $31 million in funding to date.

The platform functions as a blend of social networking and shopping, enabling users to create profiles, upload outfit photos, and tag brands with direct shopping links. Users can browse complete outfit collections, follow each other, and engage in discussions about fashion. The monetization model allows users to earn income by sharing outfits, receiving commissions when their followers make purchases through their posts. Targeting younger, trend-savvy fashion enthusiasts, 21 Buttons aims to democratize influencer status and expand its reach across markets like Spain, Italy, and the United Kingdom.

Short Description:
Swaven was a "Where to Buy" platform that provided tools for brands to guide consumers to retail locations and online purchase points. Acquired by MikMak in March 2023, Swaven's services included WTB tracking and outbound click services, allowing brands to monitor product availability and generate affiliate links. These features supported location-based store finders and pricing data, enhancing the shopping experience for consumers.

Swaven facilitated the discovery and purchase of consumer packaged goods across various categories, including food and beverages, personal care, health and pharmaceuticals, and baby care. The platform supported campaigns for well-known brands such as Sabra, Clean & Clear, Neutrogena, and Tylenol, directing traffic to retailers like Loblaws and Instacart. Following its acquisition, Swaven's infrastructure now integrates with MikMak's shoppable media platform.

WeShop Holdings Limited is a community-owned social commerce platform that integrates e-commerce with social interaction and user equity ownership. Founded by John Garner in 2012 and headquartered in Jersey, Channel Islands, WeShop operates as a shoppable social network where users can shop, share product discoveries, and earn ownership stakes in the company through their purchases and referrals. The company is publicly traded on NASDAQ under the ticker symbol WSHP.

WeShop's primary offering is the ShareBack™ program, which rewards users with shares in the company for their shopping activities. The platform features over 1 billion products from more than 500 participating retailers, including major names like Walmart, Macy's, and Nike. Users can explore various shopping categories such as fashion, health, home, food, travel, and electronics. The mobile-first platform allows for product discovery, social sharing, and a comprehensive shopping experience, all while enabling users to build wealth through community engagement.

Live® is the first agency in Belgium to support brands in the organisation of live shopping, from the expression of the need, through the production of the sessions to the analysis of the results.   
  
A global and personalised service for guaranteed efficiency.

Short Description:
Pinterest is a visual search and discovery platform based in San Francisco, launched in 2010 by Ben Silbermann, Paul Sciarra, and Evan Sharp. It allows users to find inspiration, curate ideas, and shop products through a virtual pinboard system. Originally developed as an app to digitize paper catalogs, Pinterest pivoted to focus on image collection, quickly gaining popularity after its iOS app launch in 2011.

The platform serves over 553 million monthly active users, hosting 1.5 billion boards. Users can pin images or videos to personalized boards, making it easy to discover and save ideas for various projects like home decor, recipes, and fashion. Pinterest also offers features such as visual search and shoppable pins, enhancing the user experience. The company monetizes primarily through advertising, with Promoted Pins allowing brands to reach its engaged audience effectively.

Snap Vision's computer vision and AI suite creates rich, consistent data-points from imagery.  This lets us automatically turn brands' imagery into structured data within a universal taxonomy.  This reliable data is leveraged by fashion brands and marketplaces to power visually similar product recommendations (Snap Similar), merchandising, search, filtering and data-feed optimisations (Snap Tag), and brand protection (Snap Protect).

Our solutions are low-code or no-code.  Snap Similar's product recommendations are delivered with just one line of code and no training data.  Snap Tag's tagging solution is integration free with no training data needed.  Your Snap Protect brand protection report can be in your inbox after providing us with just 250 images; an order of magnitude less than any other AI system.  We're proud to offer fast integrations and free trials to make sure you experience the value of our AI for your business before you sign on the dotted line. Headquartered in Gurugram, India, with offices in the USA and across MENA and Asia, Silverpush supports multi-market campaigns and employs around 234 to 1,300 people. Their solutions focus on data-driven targeting and campaign analysis, delivering impressive results such as a 90% average video-through-rate and 2X higher click-through-rate. Silverpush partners with over 150 major brands and agencies, emphasizing intelligent and adaptive advertising strategies.

Styla Inc. is a technology company based in Berlin, founded in 2012 by Philipp Rogge and Franz Riedl. The company specializes in headless commerce solutions that enhance website content, making it shoppable for brands and retailers. With its headquarters in Potsdam, Germany, Styla employs around 84 people and generates annual revenue of $15.8 million.

Styla's platform offers a content experience engine that automatically designs website content for immersive customer experiences across devices. It features a headless frontend solution, particularly for BigCommerce and Shopware, enabling fast and efficient storefronts. Key offerings include a PWA storefront, a no-code/low-code page builder, an image optimizer, and a pre-render engine. The platform supports one-click storefront setup and customizable templates, allowing marketing teams to manage content independently. Styla's solutions have demonstrated significant performance improvements, including increased average order value and conversion rates. The company serves various brands and retailers, helping them achieve rapid content creation and enhanced SEO.

It specializes in AI-powered contextual discovery and commerce media, helping brands turn image and video content into instant shopping experiences. Yavendio offers tiered pricing plans to accommodate different business needs, ranging from a free plan for small businesses to custom solutions for larger enterprises. The company has successfully served over 100 businesses and has recently raised $850,000 in pre-seed funding to further expand its platform.

Vyrill is an AI-powered video commerce and analytics platform based in San Francisco, California. Founded in 2015 by Ajay Bam and Dr. Barbara Rosario, the company specializes in leveraging user-generated video content from platforms like YouTube and TikTok to enhance e-commerce sales and marketing effectiveness. Short Description:
RunAgents is the operations layer for AI agents.

Most teams can get an agent working in a pilot. The hard part is running agents safely in real workflows - with write access, approvals, policy, and full traceability - the same way you'd run any production system.

RunAgents helps platform and ML teams take existing agent workflows (CrewAI, LangGraph, LangChain, custom) and operationalize them end-to-end:

Runtime & scaling: deploy agent workloads as versioned containers with rollouts and guardrails

Tool Gateway: register tools once, bind them per environment, and enforce schemas/idempotency/redaction

Identity & policy: pass end-user identity, apply role-based controls, and gate sensitive actions with approvals

Observability: full run traces, tool call logs, and audit-ready reporting

Evals as gates: reusable eval suites to prevent regressions before promotion

If you're moving from "agents in a sandbox" to "agents that touch tickets, CRM, orders, configs," RunAgents gives you the control plane to do it with confidence.

Short Description:
NBTV Inc. is a media and technology company based in New York, founded in 2006. It specializes in direct-to-consumer streaming video-commerce channels that combine entertainment content with e-commerce shopping experiences. The company primarily focuses on lifestyle and entertainment sectors, including golf, spirits, cannabis, and luxury products. 

NBTV offers innovative "shoppable entertainment" platforms, allowing viewers to engage with video content and make purchases seamlessly. Its core offerings include specialized channels like Golf Nation, which caters to golf enthusiasts, and the Spirits Network, focused on whiskey and alcohol sales. Additionally, NBTV provides 24-hour live streaming of sports, news, and original content, along with high-quality video production services. The company also features a Set Top Box that integrates various media sources into one platform. 

Targeting consumers in luxury lifestyles and regulated sectors, NBTV collaborates with universities, corporations, and brands in golf and spirits, aiming to enhance the viewing and shopping experience for its audience.
